name: My Payday Loan Relief
description_short: My Payday Loan Relief specializes in consolidating and settling payday loan debt through individualized counseling and lower monthly payment plans.
description_long:
My Payday Loan Relief is a debt settlement and consolidation company based in Winter Park, Florida, focused specifically on helping consumers trapped in payday loan debt cycles. The company positions itself as a specialist in payday loan consolidation and settlement, targeting the estimated thousands of Americans struggling with high-interest payday loans and cash advances.

The company offers two primary services: payday loan consolidation (combining multiple loans into one lower monthly payment) and a payday loan relief program (likely a debt settlement or management arrangement with creditors). They provide individualized financial counseling through experienced counselors and claim to help reduce collection calls. The company offers a free phone consultation with no obligation, and consumers can request payment estimates through a brief online form submission.

The company distinguishes itself by narrowing its focus exclusively to payday loan debt rather than general debt relief, positioning this specialization as an advantage. They emphasize quick results, a single monthly payment consolidation structure, and accessibility through multiple contact channels (phone, email, fax). The free consultation with no upfront obligation is standard marketing practice in the debt relief industry.

A critical assessment reveals significant limitations: the website provides minimal detail about fees, qualification criteria, timeline to debt freedom, or actual outcomes. No third-party reviews, testimonials, or success rates are provided. The company does not disclose whether they are accredited (IAPDA, AFCC) or regulated. The business model for payday loan consolidation is unclear—payday lenders typically do not negotiate settlements like credit card companies do, raising questions about whether this company actually settles loans or simply consolidates them into a personal loan. Consumers should verify the company's licensing, understand their fee structure, and research independent reviews before committing.
address: 4046 N Goldenrod Rd, Winter Park, FL 32792

company_info.headquarters: 4046 N Goldenrod Rd, Winter Park, FL 32792

pros: Specializes exclusively in payday loan debt, not general debt relief
Offers free phone consultation with no obligation
Claims to reduce collection calls through consolidation
Provides individualized financial counseling with experienced counselors
Consolidates multiple loans into one lower monthly payment
Available via multiple contact methods (phone, email, fax, online form)
Located at verifiable physical address in Winter Park, Florida
cons: Website does not disclose fee structure, percentage of debt, or timeline to payoff
No independent reviews, testimonials, or success rate data provided
No mention of accreditation (IAPDA, AFCC) or regulatory licensing
Unclear business model: payday lenders rarely settle debts like credit card companies do, raising questions about actual consolidation mechanism
Minimal educational content about payday loan debt or realistic expectations
best_for: Consumers with multiple payday loans seeking consolidation into a single payment
People experiencing frequent collection calls from payday lenders
Those seeking professional guidance on payday loan debt management options
Consumers interested in a free initial consultation before committing to debt relief
diagnosis: Best for consumers with multiple payday loans seeking consolidation and reduced monthly payments through professional counseling. Primary caveat: the website lacks transparency about fees, outcomes, and licensing; consumers should independently verify the company's credentials and clarify their actual settlement/consolidation mechanism before enrolling, as traditional payday loan settlement may differ fundamentally from credit card debt settlement.
services: Multi-payment consolidation into single monthly payment
